title: Linked List finish + Ranking & regression metrics
focus: Wrap LL patterns (LRU, merge-K) + NDCG / MRR / RMSE.

items.label: NDCG, MRR, MAP — by hand on a tiny example
interviewQuestions: Why is NDCG more useful than precision@K for ranking?
Compute NDCG@3 by hand for a tiny example with relevance grades [3, 2, 0].
When is MRR the right metric vs MAP?

items.label: RMSE vs MAE vs R² — when each
interviewQuestions: When does R² lie? Give a counter-example.
Why might MAE be the right metric for a delivery-time model?

When does R² lie? Give a counter-example.
How do you sanity-check that your validation metric tracks the production one?
